mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT ni.news_info_id AS newsInfoId, ni.news_title AS title, ni.news_description AS description FROM news_info ni
LEFT JOIN news_analysis na ON ni.news_info_id = na.news_info_id
WHERE na.news_info_id IS NULL ORDER BY ni.published_at DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 100
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news_analysis ( news_info_id, sentiment, score, ai_summary, analyzed_at ) VALUES ( #{newsInfoId}, #{sentiment}, #{score}, #{aiSummary}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ns.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, ni.news_info_id AS newsInfoId, ni.news_title AS title, ni.news_description AS description, na.sentiment AS sentiment, na.score AS score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ns.stock_code ORDER BY ni.published_at DESC ) rn FROM news_info_stock ns
JOIN news_info ni ON ns.news_info_id = ni.news_info_id JOIN news_analysis na ON ni.news_info_id = na.news_info_id JOIN stocks s ON ns.stock_code = s.stock_code ) WHERE rn <= 3
mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO stock_ai_summary sas USING dual ON (sas.stock_code = #{stockCode})
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET sentiment = #{sentiment}, summary = #{summary}, score = #{score}, updated_at = SYSDATE
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( stock_code, sentiment, summary, score, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{stockCode}, #{sentiment}, #{summary}, #{score}, SYSDATE )
